name: Blender Pose to Render
description: Generate character renders from Blender armature poses. Exports a pose visualization from Blender (stick figure or silhouette) and uses OpenPose ControlNet to generate a fully rendered character matching the pose. Ideal for character concept art and animation previews.

pose_image.description: Filename of the Blender pose visualization (OpenPose-style stick figure on black background)

prompt.description: Text description of the character to generate (e.g., 'a warrior in medieval armor, detailed, fantasy art')

negative_prompt.description: Things to avoid in the generation

controlnet_strength.description: Pose ControlNet influence (0.0-1.0, higher = stricter pose adherence)

notes.blender_setup: Render a stick-figure visualization of your Blender armature: use a Freestyle line render or a simple script to draw colored lines for each bone on a black background. Follow OpenPose joint color conventions for best results.
notes.sdxl_upgrade: Re-pointed from SD1.5 + control_v11p_sd15_openpose.pth to SDXL + OpenPoseXL2.safetensors (both installed). Native SDXL resolution is 1024x1024.
